other_findings.finding: LE1 cells are localized in the subcapsular sinus and medullary sinus of adult lymph nodes.

evidence_quotes.quote: LE1 lymphatic endothelial cells were identified based on high expression of PROX1, LYVE1, PDPN and VEGFR3.
evidence_quotes.context: Identification of lymphatic endothelial cell subtypes and their marker genes.

evidence_quotes.quote: CCL21 was among the top differentially expressed genes in LE1 compared to LE2 and other endothelial clusters.
evidence_quotes.context: Differential expression analysis of endothelial cell subtypes.

evidence_quotes.quote: LE1 cells are predominantly found in the subcapsular and medullary sinus regions.
evidence_quotes.context: Spatial mapping of endothelial cell populations in adult lymph node tissue.
